form.header: Let's build the AI you need
form.trust_text: Real engineers. Real builds. No vibe-coding.

seo.title: AI Solutions and Development - Content Cucumber
seo.meta_description: Custom AI solutions for your business. Chatbots, content automation, RAG applications, and intelligent workflows. Built by engineers who ship.

data.title:
AI That Works
For Your Business
paragraphs: Custom AI solutions built for your specific needs. Chatbots, content automation, intelligent workflows, and RAG applications. Built by engineers who ship.
Your free AI strategy call includes:

• Use-case mapping for your business and data
  • Build vs. buy recommendation for each opportunity
  • Cost and timeline estimate per use case
  • Vendor selection guidance (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure AI)
  • Integration plan with your existing tools and CRM
  • Written deliverable you can act on immediately

data.title: What We Build
data.subtitle: Six categories. All built on production-grade infrastructure with proper guardrails, not weekend prototypes.

items.title: Custom AI Assistants
items.text: Intelligent assistants trained on your data to help customers and employees. Built with proper context, guardrails, and human escalation paths.

items.title: Content Automation
items.text: AI-powered content workflows that respect your brand voice. Humans in the loop on every piece. AI handles the busywork. Writers handle the writing.

items.title: RAG Applications
items.text: Retrieval-augmented generation systems that let your team query your knowledge base in plain English. Your docs, contracts, and reports become a chat-able resource.

items.title: Process Automation
items.text: Repetitive tasks replaced with intelligent workflows. AI decision-making where it belongs (clear rules, low risk). Human review where it matters.

items.title: AI Integrations
items.text: Connect AI capabilities to your existing tools. HubSpot, Shopify, Slack, Notion, custom internal apps. We bridge them properly.

items.title: AI Strategy Consulting
items.text: Identify the AI opportunities that matter for your business. Build a roadmap. Skip the hype. We tell you what's worth building and what isn't.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.text: We learn your business, data, and workflows. Every AI engagement starts with understanding. Most projects need narrower scope than the brief suggests.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.text: Working prototype within 1-2 weeks. Real data, real responses, real evaluation. You see the AI doing the work before we build the production system.

steps.title: Build
steps.text: Production build with proper logging, evals, guardrails, and human-in-the-loop checkpoints. Built on OpenAI, Anthropic, or your preferred provider.

steps.title: Operate
steps.text: Monitoring, evaluation against real-world output, and ongoing tuning. AI systems drift. We catch the drift before it becomes a customer problem.

items.question: Which LLM providers do you build on?
items.answer: OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-4o), Anthropic Claude (Sonnet, Opus), Azure OpenAI, and AWS Bedrock. We choose based on your use case and data residency requirements. We're not married to one vendor.

items.question: Will my data be used to train someone else's model?
items.answer: No. We use API access with data-isolation guarantees from each provider. Your prompts and outputs do not enter training sets.

items.question: How do you handle hallucinations?
items.answer: Three layers. RAG so the model has grounding. Evaluation against known-good answers before each release. Human-in-the-loop for high-stakes decisions. We don't ship AI that makes up facts.

items.question: Can you work with our existing data?
items.answer: Yes. We pull from CRM, knowledge bases, documents, databases, and APIs. Your AI runs on your data, not generic web-scraped knowledge.

items.question: What's a typical project cost?
items.answer: Prototypes start at $5,000. Production builds range from $15,000 to $100,000+ depending on complexity, integrations, and scale. Strategy-only engagements start at $2,500.

data.title: Ready to explore AI for your business?
data.text: Tell us your challenges. We'll tell you which AI ideas are worth building, and which to skip.
